stemHtml: When is fog most likely on a west coast if the wind is 260°/10 kt in winter and the sea temperature is 18°C?

options.a: When the shore is warm, these conditions will create advection fog.
options.b: When the shore is cold, these conditions will create advection fog.
options.c: Radiation fog created during a cloudy night will be blown over the sea and maintain foggy conditions.
options.d: Radiation fog created during a clear night will be blown over the sea and maintain foggy conditions.
